summary: Verified CAOS Shell UI fixes at 1600x720 viewport. All user-reported issues have been addressed: sidebar scrolls internally (294px hidden content reachable), composer textarea is larger (108px min-height, 4 rows), Attach/Read Last buttons are smaller (~88px/111px), and Working Context Strip is visible with 5 chips.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI fixes verified at 1600x720 viewport. Sidebar uses rail-scroll-shell with overflow:auto for internal scrolling. Composer textarea has min-height:108px and rows=4. Buttons use font-size:0.84rem and padding:10px 12px. Working Context Strip displays 5 chips (ARC, Sent, Received, Facts, Global).
